subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth attacked Daein driven by sheer malice rather than strategy.
source_quote: driven not by strategy but by sheer malice

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim pushed through the pain of poison to summon a spectral weapon.
source_quote: He pushed through the pain, summoning a floating spectral weapon to keep fighting

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur quietly bore the greatest burden of all by maintaining concentration on the Wall of Force.
source_quote: It was Felkur who quietly bore the greatest burden of all, maintaining his concentration on the invisible Wall of Force

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used a moment of respite to catch his breath and recover his strength.
source_quote: Daein used a moment's respite to catch his breath and recover his strength

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth realized it could no longer play the hero.
source_quote: The Mezzaloth, realizing it could no longer play the hero

subject: Mezzaloth
fact: The Mezzaloth teleported away in desperation.
source_quote: It teleported away in desperation

subject: Fire Giants
fact: The giants were furious at the party's perceived insults to their master.
source_quote: furious at the party's perceived insults to their master

subject: Fire Giants
fact: The giants were out for blood.
source_quote: The giants were furious and out for blood

subject: Party
fact: The party was left in disbelief by the giants missing every single strike.
source_quote: leaving the entire party in disbelief

subject: Party
fact: The party was stunned by the improbable misses of the giants.
source_quote: drew stunned silence from the party

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur held his concentration on the Wall of Force through poison, fire, and relentless pressure.
source_quote: Felkur, who had held his concentration through poison, fire, and the relentless pressure of battle, held it still

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur casually dismissed the difficulty of the giants missing as a skill issue.
source_quote: "It's just a skill issue."

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur mused about engineering a device to reshape his elemental attacks.
source_quote: Felkur mused aloud about engineering a device that could reshape the very nature of his elemental attacks

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur questioned if he could sell merchandise now that he is a figure of legend.
source_quote: he had only one question: could he sell the merchandise?

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur asked if he could sell merch in response to being called a legendary phantom thief.
source_quote: "Can I sell merch?"

subject: Daein
fact: Daein marveled at the symmetry of the party defying the odds again.
source_quote: Marveling at the symmetry of the party once again defying the odds through a string of improbable lucky rolls

subject: Daein
fact: Daein compared the current survival to a battle they should have lost at the start of the campaign.
source_quote: "This reminds me of the battle that we should have lost at the start of the campaign."

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak reminded the party gravely that the battle was far from over.
source_quote: reminded them gravely that while this had been a great victory, the battle was far from over

subject: Party
fact: The party decided to stay in Sporedome instead of returning to Hillsfar.
source_quote: they decided to stay in Sporedome instead

subject: Party
fact: The party celebrated making every critical roll when it mattered most.
source_quote: the party celebrated making every critical roll when it mattered most
